title: Carnival (Darrers Dies)
location: Ciutadella, Maó, Es Mercadal y resto de pueblos
description: In Menorca, Carnival is known as 'els Darrers Dies', the last days before Lent. In 2026 it runs from Dijous Llarder (12 February) to Darrer Dimarts (17 February), with float-and-troupe parades over the weekend in Ciutadella and Maó, and open-air grills in Es Mercadal and Ciutadella.
